name: Sokensha Co.,Ltd.
summary: Sokensha Co.,Ltd. engages in the manufacture and wholesale of natural and health foods, and other related products in Japan. Its products include oil and fats, margarine, seasoning, processed goods, noodles, flour and millet, dry matter/seaweed, beverages, wine, tea, sweets, dietary supplements, gifts, cosmetics, toiletries, and others, as well as Christmas/New Year products. The company was founded in 1966 and is headquartered in Yokohama, Japan.
